def generate_application():
    global application_counter
    customer = random.choice(customers)
    customer_id = customer["customer_id"]
    name = customer["name"]
    first_name = name.split()[0].lower()
    email = f"{first_name}.{customer_id.lower()}@example.com"
    country = "South Africa"
    province = random.choice(provinces)
    tax_year = random.randint(2010, 2025)

label: produce
peekOfCode:
def produce(topic, config):
    producer = Producer(config)
    for _ in range(30):
        application = generate_application()
        key = application["customer_id"]
        value = json.dumps(application)
        producer.produce(
            topic,
            key=key,
            value=value

label: consume
main
peekOfCode:
def main():
    config = read_config()
    topic = "tax-evaluation-applications"
    produce(topic, config)
    consume(topic, config)
main()

def random_date(year):
    start = datetime(year, 1, 1)
    end = datetime(year, 12, 31)
    delta = end - start
    random_days = random.randint(0, delta.days)

def create_consumer(conf):
    conf = conf.copy()
    conf["group.id"] = "dashboard_consumer_group"
    conf["auto.offset.reset"] = "latest"
    return Consumer(conf)

config = load_config()
consumer = create_consumer(config)
